name: torch.market
description: Every token is its own margin market. Depth-adaptive risk engine, treasury-backed lending, real-token short selling, on-chain pricing from pool reserves. No oracles. No stored state. No keepers. The pool is the source of truth. Full-custody vault. Quote-driven trading across bonding curves and DEX.

env.name: SOLANA_PRIVATE_KEY
env.description: Disposable controller keypair. Optional -- only needed for direct signing. Fresh keypair, ~0.01 SOL for gas. Holds no value. All capital lives in vault. NEVER supply a vault authority key.

env.name: TORCH_NETWORK
env.description: Set to 'devnet' for devnet. Omit for mainnet.

install.label: Install Torch SDK (also bundled in lib/torchsdk/)

actions.name: TORCH_LIST_TOKENS
actions.description: List tokens with filtering and sorting

actions.name: TORCH_GET_TOKEN
actions.description: Full token detail: price, treasury, status

actions.name: TORCH_GET_TOKEN_METADATA
actions.description: On-chain Token-2022 metadata (name, symbol, URI)

actions.name: TORCH_GET_HOLDERS
actions.description: Top holders with balance and percentage

actions.name: TORCH_GET_MESSAGES
actions.description: On-chain memos from token message board

actions.name: TORCH_GET_BUY_QUOTE
actions.description: Preview buy: tokens out, fees, impact. source: bonding|dex

actions.name: TORCH_GET_SELL_QUOTE
actions.description: Preview sell: SOL out, impact. source: bonding|dex

actions.name: TORCH_GET_BORROW_QUOTE
actions.description: Max borrowable SOL for given collateral

actions.name: TORCH_GET_LENDING_INFO
actions.description: Lending parameters and pool state for migrated token

actions.name: TORCH_GET_LOAN
actions.description: Loan position: collateral, debt, LTV, health

actions.name: TORCH_GET_ALL_LOAN_POSITIONS
actions.description: All loans sorted by liquidation risk

actions.name: TORCH_GET_SHORT_POSITION
actions.description: Short position: SOL collateral, token debt, LTV, health

actions.name: TORCH_GET_VAULT
actions.description: Vault state: SOL balance, linked wallets, authority

actions.name: TORCH_GET_VAULT_FOR_WALLET
actions.description: Reverse lookup: find vault by linked wallet

actions.name: TORCH_GET_VAULT_WALLET_LINK
actions.description: Link state for a wallet

actions.name: TORCH_GET_USER_STATS
actions.description: Per-user trading stats: lifetime volume, current/previous epoch volume, rewards-claimed history

actions.name: TORCH_GET_PROTOCOL_TREASURY
actions.description: Protocol treasury state: current epoch, aggregate volumes, distributable amount for reward claims

actions.name: TORCH_GET_TREASURY
actions.description: Per-token treasury state: SOL balance, tokens held, harvested fees, baseline pool reserves at migration, stars

actions.name: TORCH_VERIFY_SAID
actions.description: Check SAID verification status and trust tier

actions.name: TORCH_BUY_TOKEN
actions.description: Buy via vault. Auto-routes bonding or DEX based on quote

actions.name: TORCH_DIRECT_BUY_TOKEN
actions.description: Buy without vault (human wallets)

actions.name: TORCH_SEND_BUY
actions.description: Build + submit vault buy via signAndSendTransaction

actions.name: TORCH_SEND_DIRECT_BUY
actions.description: Build + submit direct buy via signAndSendTransaction

actions.name: TORCH_SELL_TOKEN
actions.description: Sell via vault. Auto-routes bonding or DEX based on quote

actions.name: TORCH_CREATE_TOKEN
actions.description: Launch token with bonding curve + treasury + 300M token lock

actions.name: TORCH_SEND_CREATE_TOKEN
actions.description: Build + submit token creation via signAndSendTransaction (Phantom-friendly)

actions.name: TORCH_STAR_TOKEN
actions.description: Star token (0.02 SOL, sybil-resistant)

actions.name: TORCH_MIGRATE
actions.description: Migrate to Raydium DEX (permissionless). LP burned, authority revoked.

actions.name: TORCH_BORROW
actions.description: Borrow SOL against token collateral (depth-adaptive LTV 25-50%, vault-routed)

actions.name: TORCH_REPAY
actions.description: Repay SOL debt, unlock collateral (vault-routed)

actions.name: TORCH_LIQUIDATE
actions.description: Liquidate underwater loan (>65% LTV, 10% bonus, permissionless)

actions.name: TORCH_OPEN_SHORT
actions.description: Post SOL collateral, borrow real tokens from 300M treasury lock (vault-routed)

actions.name: TORCH_CLOSE_SHORT
actions.description: Return tokens + interest, recover SOL collateral (vault-routed)

actions.name: TORCH_LIQUIDATE_SHORT
actions.description: Liquidate underwater short (>65% LTV, 10% bonus, permissionless)

actions.name: TORCH_ENABLE_SHORT_SELLING
actions.description: Enable shorts for pre-V5 tokens (admin only)

actions.name: TORCH_CLAIM_PROTOCOL_REWARDS
actions.description: Claim epoch trading rewards (vault-routed)

actions.name: TORCH_CONFIRM
actions.description: Report tx to SAID for reputation tracking

actions.name: TORCH_CREATE_VAULT
actions.description: Create vault (creator auto-linked as authority)

actions.name: TORCH_DEPOSIT_VAULT
actions.description: Deposit SOL into vault (permissionless)

actions.name: TORCH_WITHDRAW_VAULT
actions.description: Withdraw SOL (authority only)

actions.name: TORCH_WITHDRAW_TOKENS
actions.description: Withdraw tokens from vault ATA (authority only)

actions.name: TORCH_LINK_WALLET
actions.description: Link controller wallet to vault (authority only)

actions.name: TORCH_UNLINK_WALLET
actions.description: Revoke controller access (authority only, instant)

actions.name: TORCH_TRANSFER_VAULT_AUTHORITY
actions.description: Transfer vault admin (authority only, irreversible)

actions.name: TORCH_HARVEST_FEES
actions.description: Harvest 0.07% transfer fees to treasury (permissionless)

actions.name: TORCH_SWAP_FEES_TO_SOL
actions.description: Swap harvested tokens to SOL via Raydium (permissionless)

actions.name: TORCH_ADVANCE_PROTOCOL_EPOCH
actions.description: Advance protocol epoch so previous-epoch rewards become claimable (permissionless)

actions.name: TORCH_RECLAIM_FAILED_TOKEN
actions.description: Reclaim inactive token (7+ days, permissionless)

treasury_rate.note: 17.5%→2.5% decay. Creator tokens: creator gets 0.2%→1% carved from this. Community tokens (default): 0% to creator.

lending.note: Depth-based risk bands: max LTV scales with pool SOL depth. Deeper pools are harder to manipulate, so higher leverage is permitted. Combined with per-user borrow cap, effective LTV for longs is typically <5% — making liquidation structurally near-impossible. No oracles, no baseline, no keepers. The pool is the source of truth.

credential_risk_mitigations: SOLANA_PRIVATE_KEY must be a fresh disposable controller -- never a vault authority key
On-chain program rejects authority operations from non-authority signers
Controller wallets hold ~0.01 SOL dust only
Vault authority can revoke any controller in one transaction
